Data._doc: HA produced no recovery data — the on-disk ZIP at the agent's -o path would be 22 bytes (end-of-central-directory record only, zero entries). The mock does not materialize the file; the agent should rely on Size=22 here AND the 'No available license' Error log line from `or jobs logs --level Error` for the deterministic empty-ZIP signal per healing-agent-no-license.md step 3.
